servinfo.title: Steering Angle Sensor Removal and Installation (ESP® Model)

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Steering Angle Sensor On-Vehicle Inspection (ESP® Model)

attention2.ptxt: When removing steering angle sensor, observe the following instructions to avoid malfunction of steering angle sensor.

item.ptxt: Fix the steering angle sensor so that it does not rotate.

s1.ptxt: Remove steering angle sensor (2) from contact coil assembly (3) while opening fitting engagement hooks (1) of contact coil assembly.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Install the steering angle sensor (2) to contact coil assembly after centering the contact coil assembly (1).
There are large and small grooves and projection and make sure to fit large groove (3) to large projection (4).
After installation, center the contact coil assembly.
